channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: WATCH: Disney Brings 'Toy Story 5' to Children's Hospitals
item.description: Disney and Pixar partnered with the Starlight Children's Foundation to bring 'Toy Story 5' to 300 children's hospitals nationwide.

item.title: Schiff initiates inquiry into DOJ's closure of tainted baby formula investigation
item.description: Senator Adam Schiff has started a congressional probe into why the Justice Department ended a long-running criminal investigation into bacteria-contaminated baby formula.

item.title: South Florida's Palm Beach airport renamed President Donald J. Trump International
item.description: An airport in South Florida has been officially renamed the President Donald J. Trump International Airport.

item.title: US-Iran strikes 'put into question' key parts of MOU, Qatari official says
item.description: Renewed conflict between the U.S. and Iran casts doubt on elements of the memorandum of understanding agreed by regional nations last month, a senior Qatari official stated.
